title: Device Home Screen - Device Connected and up to date
scenario: "i" icon not displayed on Device Home Screen for unencrypted or limited-support devices
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Observe the device card for the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
4. Check for the presence of an "i" icon next to the device name.
expected: An "i" icon is visible next to the device name for unencrypted devices or devices with limited support. The Home screen displays: Device Name (with "i" icon if applicable), green dot and "Connected" label, device image, quick settings (if enabled), "..." button, battery icons, and firmware version.
